title: Add a low-cost closure constraint before heavier numerics
summary: Reframe the current target observable as a consistency-search problem with typed assumptions and one additional closure constraint.

expected_artifacts.description: Step-by-step derivation of the added constraint and its assumptions (NOT_FOR_CITATION).

verification_plan: Reproduce the baseline under identical assumptions, then rerun after enabling the new closure constraint and persist both outputs with comparable metrics.
risks: The added constraint may be redundant; mitigate by proving what new information it contributes before large compute.

title: Escalate to a multi-regime extension before baseline reproduction
summary: Potential extension that spans additional regimes and heavier compute. Record it for future reuse, but do not execute before the baseline path is audited.
scope_notes: Out of scope: requires extra regimes and heavier compute before the baseline path is reproducible.
verification_plan: If promoted later, first reproduce one published or synthetic baseline in the expanded regime before adding new claims.
risks: Scope expansion would hide unresolved baseline gaps; must not execute in the current campaign.
